use_cases: Landing page hero section for SaaS products with interactive canvas animations
Product showcase pages with video playback and mouse-tracked visual effects
Modern website entry points with engagement-driving hover and scroll interactions
Portfolio or project introduction sections requiring dynamic visual appeal
Marketing pages seeking to capture attention with parallax and gradient effects
ai_summary: An interactive hero section component featuring canvas-based mouse tracking animations, glass-morphism styling, and dark mode aesthetics. The component includes built-in navigation, video playback capability, and smooth scroll animations. Ideal for SaaS landing pages, fintech products, and modern web applications requiring engaging hero sections with premium visual polish and interactive elements that respond to user input.
